The three ancestors are [[Abraham]], [[Manu]], and the [[Yellow Emperor]]. They are ancestors of all of humanity

All lived in a similar time period

Cyclical repitition of the ancestors through history is less possible though making using evolutionary history with the doctrine unlikely

Each one has a nearly identical myth except for being set in a different location and they are used to celebrate the unity of [[humans]]
[[Category:Alpha]]
[[sn:Three Ancestors]][[Category:Ancestors]]
[[Category:Alpha]]
[[sn:Three Ancestors]][[Category:Three Ancestors]]


The three ancestors are the three manifestations of the Alpha in humanity. They are three avatars of which all humans are descended

# [[Yellow Ancestor]]  of China and the [[East Asian cultural sphere]]
# [[Abraham]] ancestor of the Abrahamic religions
# [[Blue Ancestor]] ,  the figure in [[Proto-Indo-European mythology]]
<gallery class="center" mode="packed" heights="170" caption="Three Ancestors">
File:Yellowemperor2.jpg|[[Yellow Emperor]]
File:Guercino Abramo ripudia Agar (cropped).jpg|[[Abraham]]
File:The fish avatara of Vishnu saves Manu during the great deluge.jpg|[[Manu]]
</gallery>
==Succession==
#They are succeeded by the [[three prophets]] who are manifestations of the Lambda in humanity, Each of the three prophets is descended from each of the three ancestors. 
#They are then succeeded by the [[three Messiahs]] who in turn are manifestations of the Omega in humanity, all of them are currently alive and each is descended from each of the three prophets and the three ancestors

== Family tree ==
{{chart top|Family tree of the Five Ancestors}}
{{Tree chart/start|align=center| summary=Boxes and lines diagram with 95 boxes}}
{{tree chart|border=1| | | | | | PPN | | | | | | | | | | | | | | KM9 | PPN=[[PPNA|PPN]]| KM9=[[Haplogroup K-M9]]}}
{{tree chart|border=1| | | | | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |,|-|-|-|-|(| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | CAU |-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|v|-|-| ANE |-|-|-|-|-|-|.| CAU=Caucasian hunter gatherers| ANE=[[Ancient North Eurasians]]}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Tva | | | | | | | | | | |!| Tva=[[Tvastar]]}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | |,|-|-|'| | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| Pu  | | | | | | | | | | | | pie | | | | | | | | | | | | |Shen |-|-|.| Pu=Sedjepu| pie=Kautiћѓos| Shen=[[Shennong]]}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |)|-|-|-|-|.| | | | | | |,|-|^|-|.| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1i | | | aaa | | | | p1a | | | p2a | | | | | | | | | | |Yanju| | | ya  | p1i=p1i| aaa=aaa| p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| p2a=Eisolos| Yanju=Yanju| ya=Youjiao жЬЙиЯЬ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | | aaa | | | | p1b | | | p2b | | | | | | | | | | |Jiebi| | | yb  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa=aaa| p1b=MagћС ∞rios| p2b=Lab ∞okartos| Jiebi=Jiebing| yb=Minhui жХПжЕІ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | | aaa | | | | p1c | | | p2c | | | | | | | | | | |Xiqi | | | yc  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa=aaa| p1c=GбµШћѓreb ∞rialos| p2c=Alekaneros| Xiqi=Xiqi| yc=Chunxi зЇѓзЖЩ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | | aaa | | | | p1d | | | p2d | | | | | | | | | | |Zhuro| | | yd  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa=aaa| p1d=Appareimos| p2d=G ∞rƒУitob ∞eros| Zhuro=[[Zhurong]]| yd=Yilin иЙЇжЮЧ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | | aaa | | | | p1e | | | p2e | | | | | | | | | | |Gongg| | | yem | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa=aaa| p1e=Lab ∞os| p2e=UћѓelkћСelmos| Gongg=[[Gonggong]]| yem=Yingmin иЛ±жХП}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | |,|-|-|-|(| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | |aaa2 | | | | p1f | | | p2f | | | | | | |Shuqi| |Houtu| | | yf  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa2=Iram| p1f=Neiћѓ…Щos| p2f=KћСleuouћѓeikos| Shuqi=Shuqi| Houtu=[[Houtu]]| yf=Yaliang йЫЕдЇЃ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | |aaa3 | | | | p1g | | | p2g | | | | | | | | | | |Yemin| | | yg  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa3=Aush| p1g=Dreuћѓ…Щnћ•tos| p2g=EiiћѓƒУkmos| Yemin=Yeming| yg=Guangyuan еєњињЬ}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | |aaa4 | | | | p1h | | | p2h | | | | | | | | | | | Lin | | | yh  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa4=Ad| p1h=Amad√©iuћѓos| p2h=RƒУd ∞ob ∞renutos| Lin=Linkui иЗ®й≠Б| yh=Jingyi}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| p1a | | |aaa5 | | | |p1i2 | | | p2i | | | | | | | | | | |Cheng| | | yi  | p1a=TiћѓegбµШћѓtornos| aaa5=Khulud| p1i2=Reib ∞oalos| p2i=Uћѓeiktoros| Cheng=Cheng жЙњ| yi=Lingxin}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1|p1a2 | | |aaa6 | | | | p1j | | | p2j | | | | | | | | | | |Ming | | | yj  | p1a2=[[La'ibum]]| aaa6=Raya| p1j=D ∞ƒУsod≈Нros| p2j=Uћѓeiknos| Ming=Ming жШО| yj=Guiying}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1|p1a3 | | |aaa7 | | | | p1k | | | p2k | | | | | | | | | | | Zhi | | | yk  | p1a3=[[Sargon of Akkad]]| aaa7=Abdullah| p1k=Uћѓer…Щkoros| p2k=Per…Щnantos| Zhi='''Zhi''' <br />{{lang|zh|зЫі}}| yk=Zexian}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1|p1a4 | | |aaa8 | | | | p1l | | | p2l | | | | | | | | | | | Ai  | | | yl  | p1a4=[[Nahor, son of Serug|Nahor]]| aaa8=Hud| p1l=RƒУgћСiћѓokartos| p2l=EigћС ∞ƒСemos| Ai=Ai еУА| yl=Yahui}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |!| | | | |!| | | | | | |!| | | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |!| | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| wis |v|-| mit | | | | Tva |v|-| Ha  | | | | | | | | | | | Shd |v| Fub | wis=[[Terah]]| mit=Amathlaah| Tva=[[Tvastar]]| Ha=B ∞uћѓƒЂƒБ| Shd=[[Shaodian]]{{efn|Li йЗР or Ke еЕЛ}} <br />{{lang|zh|е∞СеЕЄ}}<ref>{{Cite book|last=Zhang|first=Qizhi|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=1QhJCAAAQBAJ|title=An Introduction to Chinese History and Culture|date=2015-04-15|publisher=Springer|isbn=978-3-662-46482-3|pages=3|language=en}}</ref><ref>[[Sima Qian]], ''[[Records of the Grand Historian]]''</ref>| Fub=[[Fubao]]}}
{{tree chart|border=1| |,|-|^|-|.| | | | | |,|-|-|^|v|-|-|-|.| | | | | | | | | | |,|-|^|-|.}}
{{tree chart|border=1| Abr | |Haran| | | |Manu | |Yemo | |Trito| | | | | | | | |YEL  | |Yn   | Abr=[[Abraham]]| Haran=Haran| Manu=<span style="color:red">[[User:Immanuelle/Blue Ancestor|Blue Ancestor]]</span>| boxstyle_Manu=background:DeepSkyBlue;| Yemo=Yemo| Trito=Trito| YEL=[[User:Immanuelle/Yellow Ancestor|Yellow Ancestor]]| boxstyle_YEL=background:yellow;| Yn=<sup>(2)</sup> <br />'''[[Emperor Yan|Flame Emperor]]<br>[[Yuwang]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|зВОеЄЭ}}<ref>''[[I Ching]]''</ref>| boxstyle_Yn=border-width:3px}}
{{tree chart|border=1| | | | | |!}}
{{tree chart|border=1| | | | | lot | lot=lot}}
<!-- Unused parameters: -->
{{tree chart| 13=13 sons| Sek=[[Hsekiu]]| ua=Baboon| n1=Ihuicapin| l1=Ihuicacoatl| Kha=[[Khayu]]| ub=Hippopotamus| nk=Mizquizoh| ll=Tonaltli| Tiu=[[Tiu (pharaoh)|Tiu]]| uc=Eagle| n3=Zaniton| lm=Cuetlachtli| Thesh=[[Thesh]]| ud=Set Animal| n4=Teoximina| ln=Tlazohpalli| Neheb=[[Neheb]]| ue=Scarab| n5=Ahuilizpa| l5=Chalchiuhpan| Waz=[[Wazner]]| uf=Ibis| n6=Nochchel| l6=Citlapin| Mekh=[[Mekh]]| fs=[[Finger Snail]]| n7=Toltemac| l7=Nenetzi| Seja=Sedja| fis=[[Fish (pharaoh)|Fish]]| n8=Moyolecotzin| l8=Noxochitonal| HH=[[Hedju Hor]]| ele=[[Elephant (pharaoh)|Elephant]]| n9=Nochton| l9=Ahuilizma| nh=[[Ny-Hor]]| sto=[[Stork (pharaoh)|Stork]]| n10=Tlayah| l10=Chalchiuitzal| hth=[[Hat Hor]]| bul=[[Bull (pharaoh)|Bull]]| n11=Yolitli| l11=Cihuacoztli| df=[[Double Falcon]]| sco1=[[Scorpion I]]| n12=Miahuayah| l12=Cuicaxaual| was=[[Wash (pharaoh)|Wash]]| mot=mother of red| gm=Axalihuitl| gf=Itzlotl| Croc=[[User:Immanuelle/Crocodile Emperor|Crocodile Emperor]]| RED=[[User:Immanuelle/Red Ancestor|Red Ancestor]]| boxstyle_RED=background:red;| GRE=[[User:Immanuelle/Green Ancestor|Green Ancestor]]| boxstyle_GRE=background:green;| ksks=Water| ka=[[Ka (pharaoh)|Ka]]| sco2=[[Scorpion II]]| Nar=[[Narmer]]| l4=Nenequetzal| n2=Teihuani| l2=Erenyah| l3=Chalchiuixochitl| Sha=<sup>(4)</sup> <br />'''[[Shaohao]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|е∞СжШК}}| boxstyle_Sha=border-width:3px| Chy=[[Changyi]] <br />{{lang|zh|жШМжДП}}| Jij=[[Jiaoji]] <br />{{lang|zh|иЯЬж•µ}}| Zhx=<sup>(5)</sup> <br />'''[[Zhuanxu]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|й°Уй†К}}| boxstyle_Zhx=border-width:3px| Ku=<sup>(6)</sup> <br />'''[[Emperor Ku]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|еЪ≥}}| boxstyle_Ku=border-width:3px| Qio=[[Qiongchan]] <br />{{lang|zh|з™ЃиЯђ}}| Kus=King of<br />[[Shu (state)#Early independent state of Shu|Gu Shu]]<br />{{lang|zh|еП§иЬАзОЛ}}| Mou=вЦ°| Che=Cheng <br />{{lang|zh|зІ∞}}| Tao=Taowu <br />{{lang|zh|жҐЉжЭМ}}| Mor=[[Wangliang]]<br />{{lang|zh|й≠Нй≠Й}}| Zhi2=<sup>(7)</sup> <br />'''[[Emperor Zhi]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|жМЪ}}| boxstyle_Zhi2=border-width:3px| Xi=[[Xie of Shang|Xie of<br />Shang]] <br />{{lang|zh|е•С}}| Yao={{nowrap|<sup>(8)</sup> <br />'''[[Emperor Yao|Emperor<br />Yao]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|е†ѓ}}}}| boxstyle_Yao=border-width:3px| Hou=[[Houji]] <br />{{lang|zh|еРОз®Ј}}| Jin=Jingkang <br />{{lang|zh|жХђеЇЈ}}| Ton=Lao Tong<br />{{lang|zh|иАБзЂ•}}| Dan=''[[Danzhu]]'' <br />{{lang|zh|дЄєжЬ±}}| Juw=[[Juwang]] {{lang|zh|еП•жЬЫ}}| Mou2=Luo Ming<ref>Classic of Mountains and Seas</ref>| Zur=[[Zhurong]]<br />{{lang|zh|з•ЭиЮН}}| Hui=Wuhui<br />{{lang|zh|еР≥еЫЮ}}| Qia=[[Qiaoniu]] <br />{{lang|zh|ж©ЛзЙЫ}}| Gun=[[Gun (Chinese)|Gun]] <br /> {{lang|zh|йѓА}}| Gus=[[Gusou]] <br />{{lang|zh|зЮљеПЯ}}| Yu=<sup>(10)</sup> <br />'''[[Yu the Great|Yu]]'''  <br />{{lang|zh|з¶є}}| boxstyle_Yu=border-width:3px| Zon=Luzhong<br />{{lang|zh|йЩЄзµВ}}| Ehu={{ill|Ehuang|zh|е®•зЪЗ}} <br />{{lang|zh|е®•зЪЗ}}| Shu=<sup>(9)</sup> <br />'''[[Emperor Shun]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|иИЬ}}| boxstyle_Shu=border-width:3px| Nvy={{ill|Nuying|zh|е•≥иЛ±}} <br />{{lang|zh|е•≥иЛ±}}| Kun=Kunwu <br />{{lang|zh|жШЖеРЊ}}| Can=Shen Hu<br />{{lang|zh|еПГиГ°}}| Pen=[[Peng Zu]] <br />{{lang|zh|ељ≠з•Ц}}| Hur=Hui Ren <br />{{lang|zh|жЬГдЇЇ}}| Yan_A=[[Yan An (son of Luzhong)|Yan An]] <br />{{lang|zh|жЩПеЃЙ}}| Ji=[[Jilian|Ji Lian]] <br />{{lang|zh|е≠£йА£}}| Shj=''{{ill|Shangjun|zh|еХЖеЭЗ}}'' <br /> {{lang|zh|еХЖеЭЗ}}| Noa=[[Noah]]| She=[[Shem]]| Ham=[[Ham, son of Noah|Ham]]| Jap=[[Japheth]]| 4_SON=4 sons| 7_SON=7 sons| Elm=[[Elam (Hebrew Bible)|Elam]]| Asr=[[Ashur (Bible)|Ashur]]| Apd=[[Arphaxad]]| Lud=[[Lud, son of Shem|Lud]]| Arm=[[Aram, son of Shem|Aram]]| Ke=Li йЗР or Ke еЕЛ| Th=<sup>(1)</sup> <br />'''[[Taihao]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|е§™жШК}}<ref>[[Bamboo Annals]]</ref><ref>''[[I Ching]]''</ref><ref>[[Book of Rites]]</ref>| boxstyle_Th=border-width:3px| Un=вЦ°| Yx=[[Youxiong]] <br />{{lang|zh|жЬЙзЖК}}<ref>[[Sima Qian]], [[Records of the Grand Historian]]</ref>| Hud=<sup>(3)</sup> <br />'''[[Yellow Emperor]]''' <br />{{lang|zh|йїГеЄЭ}}<ref>[[Sima Qian]], ''[[Records of the Grand Historian]]''</ref>| boxstyle_Hud=border-width:3px}}
{{Tree chart/end}}
{{chart bottom}}
<references group="lower-alpha" />

== See Also ==
* [[Three prophets]]

==Annotations==

=== Footnotes ===
{{notelist}}
===References===
<references />
[[Category:Nine Saints]]
[[sn:Three Ancestors]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
